titleStmt.title: SII 6.175: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 175. (A.R. No. 213 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Asti svastivacaḥpravriddhavibhavaḥ śrīkā¨rttavī[¨ryyā]nvayō rājādityanṛpātmajassukṛtadhīḥ kōna
kṣamādhīśvaraḥ . Ātrēyāmalagōtrava¨rddhanakarō māhiṣmatīvallabhaḥ khyātō mummaḍibhīma
dēva Iti bhūlōkē surēṁdrāyitaḥ . tasyāsītku[ladha¨rmma]va¨rddhanakarī dēvī śubācāriṇī prātra
kṣētrakumāravīrajananī rājāṁbikā suvratā [.] vēmāṁbā maṇibhūsamudgatalasadvaiḍū¨ryyalēkhā
malā cālukyānvayarāyabhūpatanayā sapu puṇyōdayaḥ . daṁpatyōranayōrabhūtpriya
yādisadguṇanidhi¨rbhbhūlōkavidyādharaḥ . lōkē svīkrita
ṇyavratō nityaśrīreṟavaṭṭabaddhavilasadbhālasthalōdbhāsitaḥ . śākābdē
vanārāyaṇaprītyai sannutadakṣiṇāyanatithau rājāṁbikānaṁdanaḥ .
bhūcaṁdratārasthiraṁ . lōkēmadhyamalōkarakṣaṇakaraśrīlōka
vanacakrava¨rtti śrīrājarājadēvara vijayarājyasaṁva
lu 1072 nēṁṭi śrāvaṇamāsamuna śuddha 11yu
guruvāramunāṁḍu Uttamacōḍavalanāṁṭi kammanāṁṭi prēṁpalli śrībhāvanārāya
svasti sahasrabāhupratāpavī¨ryyaguṇasaṁpannulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rājēṁdrakōnalōka
rājulu Ācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṁḍava¨rtti diviyakuṁ beṭṭina birudumāḍalu paṁḍreṁḍu vī
niṁ jēkoni kētarājumrāne Aradiviyayu ponnācāri Aradiviyayuṁgā niddaṟuṁ gū
ḍi tama putrānupavitrikamu nityamāneṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgalavāru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁddharāṁ [. ṣaṣṭiṁ va¨rṣasa]hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 6.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
